title: validate
text: validate Validates the widget. validate() Arguments None Exceptions None Return value An error message (string), null, or undefined. Description The framework calls the validate() function during the validation process to give the widget an opportunity to do widget validation before the framework performs the Uniface validation. If the validate() function returns a non-empty string, the framework will assume that the widget contains an error. The error occurred is used as string for the error message. If the validate() function returns nothing, or an empty string, the framework will perform the Uniface validation. Note: This API function is only fired for field-level widgets.
